largeCompareHint: Large JSON detected. Automatic comparison is paused to keep typing responsive. Click Compare now to refresh results.
originalJsonDescription: Paste the baseline JSON document here. This version is treated as the source when paths and patch operations are generated.
modifiedJsonDescription: Paste the updated JSON document here. Added, removed, and replaced paths are calculated against the original input.
resultDescription: Inspect filtered path records or switch to RFC 6902 JSON Patch output without recomputing the comparison.
noChangesLabel: No changes for the current filters
resultEmptyDescription: Enter valid JSON in both editors to compare structural changes
